headlines.headline: Jaylen Brown has not vented frustration to Celtics, Brad Stevens says
headlines.description: Brad Stevens downplayed rumors of a growing rift between Jaylen Brown and the Boston Celtics, revealing that the veteran star did not vent any frustration over the organization during a recent conversation.

headlines.headline: Stephen A.: The Knicks look destined for an NBA Finals berth
headlines.description: Stephen A. Smith reacts to James Dolan's joke about looking ahead to Shai Gilgeous-Alexander in the NBA Finals.

headlines.headline: 2026 NBA buzz: Latest news, injuries, league intel, updates
headlines.description: Here's the latest news and reactions from our NBA insiders, including the latest on Kevin Durant's lingering ankle injury.

headlines.headline: 'The Hoop Collective': Episodes of Brian Windhorst's NBA podcast
headlines.description: From breaking news to the latest intel from around the NBA, here are the top highlights from Brian Windhorst's "The Hoop Collective" podcast.

headlines.headline: Stephen A.: LeBron's one-man show is not going to work against OKC
headlines.description: Stephen A. Smith reacts to LeBron James and the Lakers' loss to the Thunder in Game 1.

headlines.headline: Ted Turner, former Braves owner, media mogul, dies at 87
headlines.description: Ted Turner, the former owner of the Braves and Hawks who made his mark as a media mogul and a philanthropist, has died at the age of 87.

headlines.headline: 2026 NFL offseason: Veterans on the hot seat after the draft
headlines.description: Could Xavier Legette lose snaps to Chris Brazzell II in Carolina? Will Carrington Valentine get jumped by Brandon Cisse on the Green Bay depth chart?

headlines.headline: Steelers' 2026 draft picks ranked from starters to projects
headlines.description: From Germie Bernard to Eli Heidenreich, who are the Pittsburgh rookies who can contribute immediately?

headlines.headline: Four questions the 49ers still need to answer this offseason
headlines.description: Which positions are still up for grabs, and when will the 49ers part ways with Brandon Aiyuk?

headlines.headline: Why new Packers DC Gannon doesn't have a defensive scheme
headlines.description: Rather than dubbing it a 3-4 or 4-3, Jonathan Gannon is focused on how Green Bay's defense will perform.

headlines.headline: Sources: NFLRA schedules vote to ratify new CBA with NFL
headlines.description: Negotiations between the NFL and the NFL Referees Association on a new CBA have progressed far enough that the union has scheduled a ratification vote for Thursday night, sources said.

headlines.headline: Jury finds Stefon Diggs not guilty of assault, strangulation
headlines.description: A jury found former New England Patriots receiver Stefon Diggs not guilty on charges of felony strangulation and misdemeanor assault and battery on Tuesday.

headlines.headline: PWHL to nix expansion draft with eye on four new teams joining
headlines.description: The PWHL is revamping its expansion rules, including the elimination of an expansion player draft, in preparing to add as many as four markets for next season.

headlines.headline: How long since a player won a Stanley Cup, NHL award in the same year?
headlines.description: The Stanley Cup is the most coveted trophy in the NHL. When was the last time a player won the Cup and an individual award in the same year?

headlines.headline: PWHL adding expansion franchise in Detroit
headlines.description: Women's professional hockey is coming to Hockeytown, with the PWHL on Wednesday designating Detroit as the first of what could become four expansion markets for next season.

headlines.headline: Stanley Cup playoffs daily: Previews, stats, schedule, bracket
headlines.description: Here are previews for both of Wednesday's games, plus highlights and key plays from Tuesday's contest.

headlines.headline: Hurricanes take 2-0 series lead into game 3 against the Flyers
headlines.description: Carolina Hurricanes (53-22-7, in the Metropolitan Division) vs. Philadelphia Flyers (43-27-12, in the Metropolitan Division)

headlines.headline: Wild searching for answers as Avalanche cruise to 2-0 lead
headlines.description: A goaltender change didn't amount to much for Minnesota on Tuesday night, as the Colorado Avalanche rolled through the Wild's newest netminder, Filip Gustavsson, on their way to a 5-2 victory, securing them a 2-0 lead in the Western Conference semifinals.
